raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad nahze fchis pats Seſ-
bazars/ un likke to Grunti tam
Deewa Namman/ kaſ Jerusa-
lemê (dsthwo)/ un ta irr no ta
Latka lihds fchim strahdahts/
bet ne pabeigts.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ja taſ nu tam Kehnixam
labbi patihſ/ tad lai ta Kehnixa
Mantu-Namma/ kaſ Babelē
irr/ meklehts tohp/ arrig tas ta
effus/ ka no ta Kehntza Kores
pawehlehts irr to Deewa-Nam-
mu Jerusaleme uszelt/ un lai
pahr to ta Kehnixa Pawehlefcha-
na pee innms fuhtita tohp.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta VI. Nodalla.
Darijus iſwaiza/ fo Kores ta Deewa Nam-
ma labbad teem Judeem pawehlejs: 1. Pa-
weht Tatnajum lai winſch tohs ne aiskawe/
bet winneem palthds: 8. Pee augſtas
Eohdibas: 11. Ta tohp ta Deewa
Namma Ustaisifchana eekſch tſchetreem Gad-
deem pabeigta: 15. Eefwehtita. 16. Un
tee Pasa-Swehtki turreti: 19.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ad pawehleja taſ Keh-
nixſch Darijuſ/ un
tee fuhtija Grahmatu-
Namma/ fur tahs Mantas bi-
ja noliktas eekſch Babelēs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un eekſch tahs Piſs Akine-
tas/ kaſ eekſch tahs Walftas
Meeden irr/ tappe weena fatih-
ta Grahmata atrasta/ un eekſch
tahs bija ta rakstihts: Par At-
gabdaſchann.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Birma Gadda ta Kehnixa
Koreta/pawehleja taſ Kehnixſch
Kores/ tam Deewa Namman
cetſch Jerusalemes/ tam Nam-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "mam buhs uſtaisitam tapt/
Weetā/ kur Uppuri tohp upp-
reti/ un winna Gruntei bu-
stiprai buht/ winna Augstu-
lai irr feſchdefmits Ohlekſchu/
feſchdefmits Ohlekſchu win-
Plattums.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ar trim Rindahm no
leem Afminieem/ un ar wee-
Rindu no januein Kohkeem.
to Maktu buhs no ta Kehni-
Namuna doht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ir ta Deewa Nam-
Selta un Sundraba Rihkus bu-
atdoht/ fo Nebukadnezars no-
Deewa Namina/ kaſ Jerusa-
mē bija/ irr aisweddis/ un
Babeli noweddis/ ka tee atgr-
schahs us to Deewa Namim
kaſ Jerusaleme irr fawa Weet-
un teem buhs nowesteem tapt
to Deewa Namnu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Nu tad/ tu Tatna-
Semmes-Walditajs winnp-
Uppes/ tu Star Bosnajus ar-
wu Draudsi/ juhs Awarsaki-
ri/ kaſ juhs winnpufs Uppes
fat/ turrajtees tahfu nohſt
winneem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Dohdeet teem Waltu
fcha Deewa Namna strahda-
ka to Judu Semmes-Wal-
tajs/ un to Judu Wezzajee
Deewa Namnu uszett fat
Weetā.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Wehl tohp no mannim
wehleits/ kaſ jums irr jada-
teem Judu Wezzajeem pee fo-
Deewa Namna Uszelfchand-
prohti/ ka no ta Kehnixa Man-
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
